action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Tusler, Andraca, Gundrum, Mayadev, Anderson, DeSmidt, Dittrich, Donovan, Goodwin, Joers, Kreibich, Miresse, O'Connor, Ortiz-Velez, Palmeri, Sheehan, Subeck, Udell, Vining and Neubauer; 
cosponsored by Senators Habush Sinykin, Jacque, Drake, L. Johnson, Wall and Wirch
